//: Copy to .sentinel-shield/accepted-risks.json. Only APPROVED, unexpired, owner-bound records suppress, and only for suppressible gates (unsafe_docker, medium_vulnerabilities). secrets/expired_exceptions/missing_release_evidence are NEVER suppressed. Suppression is reported, and the raw count is preserved (not zeroed). A Markdown draft alone does NOT suppress anything.

risks.reason: Alpine package pinning is brittle for the Chromium image; reviewed as a hygiene risk, not an exploitable CVE.
risks.mitigation: Base image is pinned; image is scanned by Trivy; revisit package pinning later.
